jobs.title: Government Pharmacist (Railway Recruitment Board)
jobs.description: Indian Railways invites applications for the post of Pharmacist in Railway Hospitals. The pharmacist will manage dispensing and inventory of life-saving medical stock.
responsibilities: Dispense medications accurately to railway employees and pensioners.
Maintain narcotics logs, drug supplies, and check storage conditions.
Coordinate inventory audits and report shortfalls to the medical officer.
requirements: B.Pharm or D.Pharm from a PCI-approved government institute.
Valid registration with State Pharmacy Council of India.
Age limit between 20 and 35 years.
benefits: Central government quarters and accommodation benefits.
Free medical passes and rail travel tickets.
Pension and provident fund statutory support.

jobs.title: Government Drug Inspector (Group A Officer)
jobs.description: UPSC is conducting recruitment for Drug Inspectors under the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO). Selected officers will execute compliance audits and safety enforcement.
responsibilities: Inspect pharmaceutical manufacturing units and wholesale distributors.
Collect suspected drug samples and transmit them to Central Laboratories for testing.
Investigate regulatory deviations, fake drugs, and represent CDSCO in judicial courts.
requirements: Degree in Pharmacy or Pharmaceutical Sciences from a recognized university.
Minimum 18 months of practical experience in manufacturing of active substances.
Sound understanding of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940.
benefits: Central Government Grade-A officer rank and travel allowance.

jobs.title: Government Staff Nurse (Group B)
jobs.company: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS)
jobs.description: AIIMS is hiring Nursing Officers (Staff Nurse) for critical care, ICU, and inpatient wards. The role provides direct clinical nursing support in state-of-the-art government clinics.
responsibilities: Administer clinical medication and intravenous fluids under doctor supervision.
Monitor ICU medical machinery and provide vital updates to medical teams.
Maintain patient sanitary records and clinical safety compliance.
requirements: B.Sc. Nursing or GNM from a recognized nursing council.
Valid state nursing council registration certificate.
Ages between 21 and 35 years.
benefits: Central Government DA, HRA, and medical schemes.
Shift premiums and night allowance benefits.

jobs.title: Government Medical Laboratory Technician
jobs.description: The National Health Mission is recruiting Laboratory Technicians for rural and urban community health centers. Responsibilities include laboratory pathology assessments.
responsibilities: Collect and process blood, plasma, and fluid samples for diagnostic tests.
Execute automated biochemistry analysis in compliance with laboratory protocols.
Maintain records of laboratory samples and diagnostic outputs.
requirements: DMLT (Diploma in Medical Lab Technology) or B.Sc. MLT.
Valid state registration certificate.
Strong understanding of laboratory safety guidelines.
benefits: PF, ESI, and NHM regular increments.
Government service certificate points for permanent scales.

jobs.title: Senior Research Fellow (SRF) - Govt Project
jobs.company: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR)
jobs.description: CSIR is seeking a Senior Research Fellow for a government-sponsored pharmacology project. Candidates will synthesis target drug compounds.
responsibilities: Lead molecular synthesis and characterization using 1H-NMR.
Compile project reports and coordinates with lead principal scientists.
Mentor JRF interns inside the laboratory environment.
requirements: M.Pharm or M.Sc in Organic Chemistry.
2 years post-master laboratory research experience.
GPAT or CSIR-NET qualification is preferred.
benefits: CSIR fellowship grants and HRA support.
Access to advanced molecular imaging and testing tools.

jobs.title: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) - Defense Life Sciences
jobs.description: DRDO invites applications for a JRF position in defense pharmacology projects. Role involves testing bio-sensors and protective formulation designs.
responsibilities: Execute bio-assays and dosage testing profiles.
Maintain laboratory registers and document research reports.
Draft scientific presentations for defense panels.
requirements: M.Pharm or M.Sc in Biotechnology / Pharmacology.
Mandatory GPAT or CSIR-NET / GATE score.
Maximum age of 28 years (relaxation applicable).
benefits: DRDO research stipend and campus HRA support.
Opportunity for PhD registration with top national institutes.

jobs.title: R&D Scientist - Formulations
jobs.description: Sun Pharma is hiring researchers for Formulation Research & Development (F&R&D). Candidates will work on dosage form designs, stability studies, and lab scale trials.
responsibilities: Design and execute formulations for oral solids and liquid dosage forms.
Compile stability data and troubleshoot formulation failures.
Coordinate with the Tech Transfer team for scale-up operations.
requirements: M.Pharm in Pharmaceutics with minimum 60% academic score.
Hands-on experience with tablet compression and coating machines.
Understanding of ICH guidelines for stability testing.
benefits: Subsidized transport and corporate health plans.
Access to advanced molecular characterization labs.

jobs.title: Quality Assurance (QA) Associate
jobs.description: We are seeking a detail-oriented Quality Assurance Associate to join our formulations unit. You will handle in-process quality audits (IPQA) and document reviews.
responsibilities: Perform line clearance checks across compounding, packaging, and filling lines.
Review Batch Manufacturing Records (BMR) and Batch Packaging Records (BPR).
Report non-conformances and initiate initial deviation assessments.
requirements: B.Pharm or M.Pharm degree from a PCI-approved college.
Familiarity with cGMP compliance norms and FDA guidelines.
Strong observation and communication skills.
benefits: Subsidized meals and free company shuttle.

jobs.title: Quality Control (QC) Analyst
jobs.description: Join our Quality Control team. The analyst will perform routine and non-routine analysis of active pharmaceutical ingredients (API) and raw materials.
responsibilities: Conduct chemical analysis using HPLC, GC, and UV-Vis spectrophotometers.
Meticulously document analytical test data in accordance with GLP.
Maintain laboratory equipment calibrations.
requirements: M.Sc. in Analytical Chemistry or organic chemistry.
1 to 3 years experience in a regulated QC laboratory.
Knowledge of Empower software is preferred.

jobs.title: Tech Transfer (TT) Executive
jobs.description: Seeking a Tech Transfer specialist to manage scale-ups and technology transmissions from lab-scale to commercial manufacturing sites.
responsibilities: Prepare Technology Transfer Protocols and reports (TTP & TTR).
Coordinate with R&D and Manufacturing teams for trial batches.
Troubleshoot manufacturing anomalies during scale-up runs.
requirements: M.Pharm in Pharmaceutics or Industrial Pharmacy.
Minimum 3 years experience in commercial tech transfer.
Strong understanding of process validation principles.

jobs.title: Regulatory Affairs (RA) Associate
jobs.description: Cipla is looking for Regulatory Affairs executives to compile and submit dossiers for US, EU, and emerging markets.
responsibilities: Compile and review CMC data for eCTD submissions.
Address queries from regulatory agencies (FDA, EMA) within timelines.
Track regulatory updates and coordinate with production teams for compliance data.
requirements: M.Pharm or M.Sc. in Life Sciences.
2+ years experience in global dossier submissions.
Detail-oriented with strong documentation skills.

jobs.title: Production Chemist - Formulations
jobs.description: Production Chemist needed for tablet and capsule manufacturing blocks. Responsibility includes executing shop floor operations in shift cycles.
responsibilities: Supervise granules mixing, compressing, and coating processes.
Ensure compliance with Batch Manufacturing Record instructions.
Maintain cleanrooms and equipment sanitizations in line with SOPs.
requirements: B.Pharm or Diploma in Chemical Engineering.
Willingness to work in rotating night shifts.
Basic operational knowledge of tablet compression machines.

jobs.title: Warehouse Supervisor
jobs.description: Divi's Labs is hiring a Warehouse Supervisor to handle raw materials receiving, storage compliance, and inventory management.
responsibilities: Execute receiving inspections and storage entries.
Coordinate inventory checks and dispatch dispensing requests.
Ensure temperature and humidity records match GMP rules.
requirements: B.Sc. in Chemistry or commerce graduate with warehouse experience.
Familiarity with ERP / SAP warehouse modules is a plus.
Physical stamina and attention to detail.
benefits: Provident Fund and regular yearly increments.

jobs.title: Packing Operator / Officer
jobs.description: Biocon is seeking blister and bottle packing line operators. Candidates will oversee automated packing lines and maintain quality logs.
responsibilities: Operate blister packing and carton printing systems.
Verify online product descriptions, batch numbers, and expiries.
Perform line cleaning and documentation entries.
requirements: Diploma or B.Sc. with practical packing operations training.
Knowledge of operating blister machines.
Attentive to detail and shift work comfort.

jobs.title: Pharmacovigilance (PV) Associate
jobs.description: Cognizant is recruiting PV Associates to perform adverse event reporting, case translations, and clinical data entries.
responsibilities: Analyze individual adverse drug reaction cases.
Perform medical coding and data entries in PV databases.
Prepare periodic safety update reports (PSUR) for review.
requirements: B.Pharm, M.Pharm, or PharmD degree.
Strong understanding of medical terminologies.
Analytical mind with good written English skills.

jobs.title: Medical Coding Specialist
jobs.description: Medical Coder needed to assign appropriate ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS codes to patient clinical documents.
responsibilities: Review medical charts and convert diagnoses/treatments into standardized codes.
Maintain 98%+ coding accuracy and compliance with guidelines.
Participate in weekly coding audits.
requirements: Graduation in Life Sciences (B.Sc, B.Pharm, Biotech).
CPC (Certified Professional Coder) certification is a strong advantage.
Excellent understanding of human anatomy and physiology.
benefits: Performance bonuses and PF / ESI support.

jobs.title: Internship - Quality Assurance & QC
jobs.description: Granules India offers a 6-month internship program for pharmacy graduates. Interns will rotate between the QA documentation and QC analytical blocks.
responsibilities: Assist in maintaining laboratory records and documentation registers.
Observe wet chemistry tests under senior guidance.
Support archiving and line inspections tasks.
requirements: B.Pharm or M.Sc Chemistry student in final semester.
Enthusiasm to learn and strictly follow cGMP guidelines.
Active communication skills.

jobs.title: Executive Assistant & Other Admin Jobs
jobs.description: Hiring an administrative assistant for our corporate manufacturing team. Role handles coordination, scheduling, and miscellaneous administrative support.
responsibilities: Schedule internal alignment meetings and prepare minutes.
Compile monthly production spreadsheets and reports.
Maintain document controls for corporate SOP registries.
requirements: Bachelor degree with high computing literacy (MS Office).
Experience in administrative operations within any pharmaceutical setup.
Strong written and verbal English skills.

jobs.title: Automation & Maintenance Engineer
jobs.description: Lupin is seeking an Automation & Maintenance Engineer to oversee instrumentation, machinery calibrations, and HVAC systems in our manufacturing blocks.
responsibilities: Oversee daily calibration schedules for manufacturing instrumentation.
Troubleshoot PLC/SCADA failures on production machinery.
Execute preventive maintenance tasks in compliance with GMP guidelines.
requirements: B.Tech/B.E in Instrumentation, Electrical, or Mechanical Engineering.
Minimum 2 years experience in a sterile manufacturing plant.
Familiarity with PLC systems (Siemens/Allen Bradley).
benefits: Competitive corporate pay and annual bonus.

jobs.title: Chemical Process Engineer
jobs.description: Dr. Reddy's is seeking a Process Engineer to drive scale-up processes, chemical optimization, and process validation checks for active pharmaceutical ingredients (API) synthesis.
responsibilities: Optimize chemical synthesis scaling from laboratory to commercial reactors.
Design process flow diagrams and piping instrumentation updates.
Validate thermal safety checks and solvent recovery operations.
requirements: B.Tech/B.E in Chemical Engineering from a recognized university.
3+ years process engineering experience in API setups.
Excellent data compilation and chemical troubleshooting skills.
benefits: PF, gratuity, and performance bonus structures.

jobs.title: Calibration & Instrumentation Specialist
jobs.description: Sun Pharma is recruiting a specialist to manage high-precision sensor calibrations, pressure valves, and thermal controller systems in analytical labs.
responsibilities: Calibrate HPLC, GC, and temperature sensors on schedule.
Document calibration logs for FDA audit reference.
Troubleshoot instrumentation drifts and align laboratory parameters.
requirements: Diploma or Degree in Instrumentation Engineering.
1-3 years experience in instrumentation or calibration.
Understanding of FDA documentation requirements.
